name: Name
download_dump_tip: Download the latest database dump in .sql format
delete_db_warning: Warning! Deleting this DB may break tasks that reference it.
save_state_tip: Create a snapshot of the DB. Maximum 5 recent snapshots will be kept.
reset_db_tip: Rollback the DB to a previously saved state.
reset_modal_desc: Select a state from the list below. Current data will be completely deleted and overwritten.
